title: FSR: Cobblestone Chronicles
description: Explore, Create, Expand your skills and levels in a RPG styled mod pack
body:
Explore, Create, Expand your skills and levels in a RPG styled mod pack

This modpack is a passion project containing 400+ mods. This was built up with exploration in mind as well as abilities, magic and creation
Choose an origin, choose a species, choose a job, choose a class and level up! Explore the world and find your forever home. Regions unexplored is a staple in my modpacks and love the variety of biomes it brings. There are some mods added that changes the landscape just a little bit. Just enough to make it stand out a little more than it would normally with deeper oceans and bigger rivers. Explore the world, level up, and create to your hearts content.

Shoutout to zueljin gaming for the modpack insipration based on his long standing series.

**_This modpack requires 8GB MINIMUM and due to the size of the mods may take longer than normal to load a world or connect to a server_**
